# /party Command — Multi-Agent Round-Table

Workflow for `/party`: topic handling, agent enumeration, panel selection, sequential dispatch, and synthesis.

## Command Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["/party [topic]"] --> B{Topic provided?}
    B -- No --> C["AskUserQuestion: What topic?"]
    C --> D{Response empty?}
    D -- Yes, once --> E["Re-prompt once"]
    E --> D2{Still empty?}
    D2 -- Yes --> F["Error: topic required"]
    D2 -- No --> G
    D -- No --> G["Normalize topic → slug"]
    B -- Yes --> G

    G --> H["Phase 1: Agent Enumeration"]
    H --> H1["Glob agents/bmad-*.md → BMAD Roles"]
    H --> H2["Glob agents/*.md (excl. bmad-*, party-coordinator) → ECC Specialists"]
    H --> H3["Glob .claude/agents/*.md → Project Domain"]
    H1 & H2 & H3 --> I["Extract name+description from frontmatter"]
    I --> J["Present grouped inventory to user"]

    J --> K["Phase 2: AskUserQuestion — selection mode"]
    K --> L{Mode?}
    L -- "A: Manual" --> M["User picks 2–8 agents"]
    L -- "B: Claude-recommended" --> N["Claude selects 3–6 with rationale"]
    M & N --> O["Validate: 2–8 agents"]

    O --> P["Phase 3: party-coordinator dispatch"]
    P --> P1["Agent 1: generate perspective"]
    P1 --> P2["Agent 2: respond to Agent 1"]
    P2 --> P3["Agent N: build on prior turns"]
    P3 --> Q["party-coordinator: synthesis"]

    Q --> R["Phase 4: Persist output"]
    R --> S["Write docs/party/YYYY-MM-DD-{slug}.md"]
    S --> T["Display synthesis to user"]

    style F fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style T fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style P1 fill:#74c0fc
    style P2 fill:#74c0fc
    style P3 fill:#74c0fc
```

## Agent Sources

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph Sources
        B1["agents/bmad-pm.md"]
        B2["agents/bmad-architect.md"]
        B3["agents/bmad-dev.md"]
        B4["agents/bmad-qa.md"]
        B5["agents/bmad-security.md"]
        E1["agents/doc-analyzer.md"]
        E2["agents/audit-orchestrator.md"]
        E3["agents/tdd-executor.md"]
        EN["agents/*.md (60+)"]
        P1[".claude/agents/*.md"]
    end

    subgraph Groups
        G1["BMAD Roles (5)"]
        G2["ECC Specialists (60+)"]
        G3["Project Domain (varies)"]
    end

    B1 & B2 & B3 & B4 & B5 --> G1
    E1 & E2 & E3 & EN --> G2
    P1 --> G3

    G1 & G2 & G3 --> Panel["Panel (2–8 agents)"]
    Panel --> Coordinator["party-coordinator"]
    Coordinator --> Output["docs/party/{slug}.md"]
```
